particulars.description: Floating charge over the whole of the company's undertaking and all its property and assets present and future.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee pursuant to a distribution agreement dated 16TH november 2000 (as amended and restated from time to time)

particulars.description: Fixed and floating charges over the undertaking and all property and assets present and future including goodwill bookdebts uncalled capital buildings fixtures fixed plant and machinery. See the mortgage charge document for full details.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee pursuant to a distribution agreement dated 12TH october 2000 and a letter agreement dated 28TH july 2000 and all reasonable costs charges and expenses
